input:
Write down: ‘In your name, Our Lord’.” The Prophet told ʿAlī to write the phrase Suhayl proposed. He continued with his dictation: “These are the terms of the peace agreement negotiated between Muhammad, God’s Messenger, and Suhayl ibn ʿAmr.” Again, Suhayl interrupted: “Had I accepted that you are God’s messenger, I would not have fought you. You have to write down your name and your father’s name.” The Prophet accepted Suhayl’s point and revised his dictation, telling ʿAlī to write: These are the terms of the peace agreed by Muhammad ibn ʿAbdullāh and Suhayl ibn ʿAmr. • Both have agreed to a complete truce for a period of ten years, during which all people will enjoy peace and security and will not attack one another. • Moreover, if anyone from the Quraysh joins Muhammad without permission from his guardian or chief, he shall be returned to the Quraysh. • If anyone from those in the camp of Muhammad joins the Quraysh, they are not required to return him. • Both sides agree that they harbour good intentions towards each other. • No theft or treachery shall be condoned. • Whoever wishes to enter into an alliance with Muhammad may do so, and whoever wants to enter into an alliance with the Quraysh may do so. • It is further agreed that you, Muhammad, shall return home this year without entering Makkah.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 28: Peace in the Making

output.scene_title: The Prophet Dictates the Terms of Peace
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 28: Peace in the Making

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by green cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Suhayl ibn ʿAmr
characters.appearance: Late 40s, medium olive skin, tall and slender, athletic build. Short black beard, neatly trimmed. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Strong, stern facial expression, raised eyebrow.

characters.name: ʿAlī ibn Abī Ṭālib
characters.appearance: Late 20s, light olive skin, lean build, slightly younger-looking than average. Dark hair, short beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Inquisitive, attentive eyes, slight smile.

output.moral_lesson: Humility and flexibility are essential in achieving peace and resolving conflicts.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet dictated the terms of peace to ʿAlī, including the agreement to a complete truce for ten years. Suhayl proposed changes, which the Prophet accepted to ensure a lasting peace.

compliance.notes: The Prophet is shown from behind, while Suhayl and ʿAlī are shown with full faces. The scene depicts a respectful and peaceful atmosphere.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Interior of a modest 7th century Makkah mud-brick home, late afternoon sunlight streaming through an open doorway. A man in white thobe and green cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing at a low table with ʿAlī sitting on a woven mat, quill in hand, writing on a clay tablet. Suhayl stands beside them, tall and imposing, wearing off-white thobe and brown cloak, looking at the Prophet with a stern expression. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
